title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: crypto-policies bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for crypto-policies is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: add a PQ subpolicy to RHEL-9 crypto-policies
X25519-MLKEM768 should be aliased to MLKEM768-X25519 [rhel-9]
enable ED25519 in RHEL-9 NSS policy
Update crypto policies to support PQC in rpm-sequoia [rhel-9]
enable ML-DSA in NSS in PQ subpolicy [rhel-9]
Enable ML-KEM hybrids in NSS in PQ subpolicy [rhel-9]
Red Hat packages cannot be installed with dnf multisig plugin
allow PQ algorithms in all rpm-sequoia crypto-policies (RHEL-9)

full_text:
An update for crypto-policies is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
